headline: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Wins Grant Thornton Role And Launches AI Agent Identity Tool
summary: CrowdStrike (NasdaqGS:CRWD) was selected by Grant Thornton Advisors LLC as the unified foundation for its managed security services, centered on the Falcon platform. The collaboration focuses on deploying AI-powered managed detection and response solutions for Grant Thornton’s global client base. CrowdStrike also introduced Continuous Identity for AI Agents, a new capability that applies real-time, risk-aware authorization and identity enforcement to AI agent activity in enterprise...

headline: CrowdStrike Named a Leader in Extended Detection and Response by Independent Research Firm
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, June 16, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced it has been named a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Extended Detection and Response Platforms, Q2 20261 report. CrowdStrike ranked highest of any vendor evaluated in the Current Offering category and received the highest possible scores across the Strategy criteria of Innovation and Community.

headline: A new technology is learning how to move money

headline: Databricks strikes deal to buy Panther Labs in cybersecurity push
summary: Databricks on Tuesday said it agreed to buy the ‌startup Panther Labs, as the U.S. ‌data analytics provider pushes deeper into the cybersecurity business.  The acquisition, ​Databricks' third in this area, furthers its aim to compete with security management incumbents like CrowdStrike  and Cisco's Splunk.  Databricks declined to comment on ‌the deal terms.

headline: CrowdStrike’s Open Gateway Ecosystem Makes Falcon AI’s Control Plane
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, June 16, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced it is extending CrowdStrike Falcon® AI Detection and Response (AIDR) across leading AI gateway partners, including Databricks, Google Cloud, JetStream Security, Kong, LiteLLM, Maxim AI, Microsoft Azure, and TrueFoundry, delivering AI’s security control plane.

headline: Grant Thornton Advisors Standardizes MSSP Operations on CrowdStrike Falcon Complete, Replacing Legacy MDR with Agentic MDR

headline: Trump Administration Clears Delta in CrowdStrike Outage Probe, Ends Investigation Into Travel Meltdown That Impacted 1.3 Million Passengers
summary: Trump administration cleared Delta in its probe of the 2024 CrowdStrike outage, ending the investigation without penalties.
